positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a sleepy fox curled up in a basket of vibrant wildflowers. The style should be a blend of watercolor and modern vector art, giving it a soft, cozy, and cottagecore aesthetic. The fox has gentle, sleepy eyes and soft fur texture. The wildflowers include daisies, lavender, and small pops of red. Composition is centered, suitable for a sticker or print. Cinematic lighting, soft glow, volumetric light, extremely high detail, award-winning illustration, trending on ArtStation, maximalist floral, hygge, warm color palette, 8k, masterpiece.
